project.name: hitech-portal
project.purpose: Daily activity reporting and asset management for Hitech Construction Ltd

stack.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 (custom warm-amber design system)

auth_flow.password_format: Django pbkdf2_sha256 (compatible with existing Django user table)
auth_flow.signup: Creates row in auth_user + auto-creates surveycollection_employee profile
auth_flow.login: Verifies pbkdf2_sha256 hash from auth_user, sets iron-session cookie

clients.browser: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL + NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (direct REST from client pages)

surveycollection_employee.purpose: Employee profiles linked to user accounts

data.GET /api/sections: List sections with resolved project names

employees.DELETE /api/employees/[id]: Delete employee + related FK rows (admin only)

machines.GET /api/worker/machines: Machines assigned to current worker (3-step lookup: user_id → email → auto-create employee)
machines.POST /api/worker/machines/update: Worker confirms receipt or returns machine, writes history row

reports.POST /api/reports/submit: Submit activity report (overlap-checks chainage, inserts to 6 tables)
reports.GET /api/reports/chainage: Query used chainages for a section

pages./login: Boot-sequence animation, password unlock UI, role-based redirect after login
pages./signup: Account creation with 9 job roles (Engineer, Supervisor, Operator, etc.)
pages./portal: Role-split dashboard — admin tiles vs worker tiles
pages./equipment: Machine registry with deployment/health status management (admin)
pages./reports/submit: Multi-section activity report form with chainage validation + photo upload
pages./worker/machines: Worker's assigned machines with confirm/return/update-health actions

components.PageShell: Standard page chrome — sticky header, back button, exported design tokens
components.Select: Custom searchable dropdown with viewport-aware positioning
components.AmbientBackground: Canvas particle flow-field background (520 particles, vortex + sine noise)
components.CityLoader: Three.js procedural city with scan-sweep animation (used as loading screen)

known_limitations.rls_not_enforced_client_side: Client pages query Supabase directly with anon key — RLS policies must be correct or data leaks
known_limitations.no_email_verification: Signup creates account immediately, no email confirmation step
known_limitations.django_password_schema: Password hashing tied to Django's pbkdf2_sha256 — migration needed if moving to native Supabase Auth
known_limitations.chainage_overlap_check: Done in API, not DB constraint — concurrent submissions could theoretically race
known_limitations.no_refresh_token: iron-session cookies expire after 7 days with no silent renewal

supabase_realtime.what: Live updates when machines are assigned/returned or reports submitted
supabase_realtime.benefit: Admin sees fleet movement live without refreshing

supabase_rls.what: Row-level security policies so workers can only see their own data client-side
supabase_rls.how: Enable RLS on employee + machine tables, add user_id policies
supabase_rls.benefit: Closes the current data-leak surface on anon-key queries

supabase_storage.what: Replace current upload endpoint with Supabase Storage buckets
supabase_storage.how: Use @supabase/supabase-js storage API, store URLs in hitech_report_hitechphoto
supabase_storage.benefit: CDN delivery, access control, no custom upload server needed

pwa_offline.what: Service worker + IndexedDB so workers can submit reports with no signal
pwa_offline.how: Next.js PWA plugin, queue submissions locally, sync when online
pwa_offline.benefit: Construction sites often have dead zones — major usability win

supabase_auth_migration.what: Replace iron-session + Django password hashing with native Supabase Auth
supabase_auth_migration.how: Migrate users, use @supabase/ssr for server-side session, drop iron-session
supabase_auth_migration.benefit: Magic links, OTP, social logins, built-in token refresh — zero custom auth code

push_notifications.what: Push alerts when a machine is deployed to a worker, or report is reviewed
push_notifications.how: Web Push API + Supabase Edge Functions as webhook trigger
push_notifications.benefit: Workers know immediately when they have a new machine assignment

gps_chainage_validation.what: Validate reported chainage against GPS coordinates from device
gps_chainage_validation.how: Browser Geolocation API on report form, compare against known route geometry

report_pdf_export.what: Generate printable PDF daily activity reports
report_pdf_export.how: Supabase Edge Function using Puppeteer or @react-pdf/renderer
report_pdf_export.benefit: Client-deliverable sign-off reports without manual formatting

analytics_dashboard.what: KPI charts — daily progress by section, machine utilisation, crew hours
analytics_dashboard.how: Recharts or Chart.js reading from existing report tables
analytics_dashboard.benefit: Project managers see progress trends at a glance

mobile_app.what: React Native or Expo app sharing the same API layer
mobile_app.how: Point to same /api/* endpoints, reuse types from src/lib/types.ts
mobile_app.benefit: Native camera access for photos, GPS, offline-first

gis_map_view.what: Interactive road map showing chainage progress overlaid on a route
gis_map_view.how: Mapbox GL JS or Leaflet with chainage segments stored as GeoJSON in Supabase
gis_map_view.benefit: Visual progress reporting for client presentations

ai_report_assistant.what: Claude fills in report fields from a voice memo or short text description
ai_report_assistant.how: Vercel AI SDK + claude-sonnet-4-6, structured output matching report schema
ai_report_assistant.benefit: Workers speak their day's work, AI drafts the report

equipment_maintenance_module.what: Scheduled maintenance tracking, breakdown ticketing, parts inventory
equipment_maintenance_module.how: New Supabase tables: maintenance_schedule, breakdown_tickets, parts_inventory
equipment_maintenance_module.benefit: Proactive fleet health management beyond current health_status field

supabase_edge_functions.what: Move heavy API logic (report submit, chainage checks) to Supabase Edge Functions
supabase_edge_functions.how: Deno-based functions triggered by DB inserts or HTTP calls
supabase_edge_functions.benefit: Removes compute from Next.js server, enables DB-native overlap detection
